description_long: This is a yellow lemon with a slightly oval shape and a textured, dimpled peel. One side of the lemon displays a large patch of bluish-white mold, indicating spoilage, while the rest of the surface remains a consistent yellow. The peel appears intact and unbroken, with a glossy sheen that reflects light. The lemon's surface is uneven, with natural dimples and a subtle gradient of yellow tones. The mold patch is fuzzy and covers a significant portion of one side, contrasting sharply with the otherwise smooth and shiny peel. No stickers, labels, or other markings are visible on the exterior.
description: A yellow, oval lemon with a dimpled, glossy peel and a large patch of bluish-white mold on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the lemon's yellow peel with a prominent bluish-white mold patch covering a large area.
description_view_1: The lemon is mostly yellow here, with the edge of the mold patch visible on the left side.
description_view_2: This side displays a clean, uninterrupted yellow peel with no visible mold or blemishes.
description_view_3: The lemon appears entirely yellow and smooth, with only a faint hint of discoloration near the edge.
attribute_peel_condition: The peel is dimpled, glossy, and intact, with a large fuzzy mold patch and no visible cracks or peeling.
